I generally apply Kaal Chakra Dasha for this
astrological application since this Dasha is
related to Lord Shiva and in this story of Moon
re-birth is given by Lord Shiva. But in many
cases, the Maha Dasha with Moon in the sign
in this system does not appear in main phase
of life for a native. However, I find if there is
a clear Dasha of Moon in Vimsottari Dasha, it
also works Or during Dasha of that planet in
whose house Moon is posted alone.
